title: SkillBurst Gamified Micro-Learning Platform - Frontend Implementation

requirements.summary: Create lesson catalog page with filterable lesson cards showing categories, difficulty, duration, and progress
acceptanceCriteria: Lesson catalog displays at least 3-5 skill categories
Each lesson card shows title, duration, difficulty, and progress
Users can filter lessons by category and difficulty
Clicking a lesson card navigates to the lesson detail page

file_operations.description: Create custom hooks for fetching all lessons, lessons by category, and user progress using React Query. Use getAllLessons() and getLessonsByCategory() from backend interface. Verify the authorization component's usage instructions before implementing.
Create lesson card component displaying title, estimated time, difficulty badge, category, and progress indicator. Include onClick handler for navigation to lesson detail.

Create lesson catalog page component with category and difficulty filter controls. Render grid of LessonCard components. Show empty state using frontend/public/assets/generated/empty-lessons.dim_400x400.png when no lessons match filters.
Add route for /lessons path using LessonCatalog component. Ensure route is accessible after user authentication.

requirements.summary: Implement interactive lesson player with sequential segments, multiple exercise types, and progress tracking
acceptanceCriteria: Lesson player displays content in sequential segments
At least 3 types of interactive exercises are supported (multiple-choice, drag-and-drop, fill-in-blank)
Users can navigate between lesson segments
Progress is saved after completing each segment
Interactive elements are responsive and work on different screen sizes

file_operations.description: Create mutation hook for updateProgress() backend method to save segment completion status. Invalidate user progress queries on success. Verify the authorization component's usage instructions before implementing.
Create multiple-choice exercise component with selectable options and submit handler. Support touch and click interactions.
Create drag-and-drop exercise component using HTML5 drag API or touch events. Ensure mobile-friendly interaction.
Create fill-in-the-blank exercise component with input fields for answers. Support keyboard navigation.

Create lesson player component that renders current segment content and appropriate exercise type based on InteractiveExercise data. Include previous/next navigation controls. Track and display segment progress. Call useUpdateProgress hook when segment is completed.
Add route for /lesson/:lessonId path using LessonPlayer component. Ensure route is protected and accessible only to authenticated users.

requirements.summary: Build immediate feedback system with real-time validation, explanations, and segment summaries
acceptanceCriteria: User receives instant feedback (within 1 second) after submitting an answer
Correct answers show positive reinforcement with visual indicators
Incorrect answers display explanations and hint towards the correct solution
Lesson segment summary shows accuracy percentage and key learning points
Feedback messages are encouraging and constructive

file_operations.description: Create feedback component that displays correct/incorrect indicators with animations, explanation text from InteractiveExercise.explanation, and encouraging messages. Use vibrant colors and smooth transitions.
Create segment summary component showing accuracy percentage, key takeaways from completed segment, and continue button. Include celebratory animations for high accuracy scores.
Add client-side answer validation comparing user selection with InteractiveExercise.correctAnswer. Render FeedbackDisplay component with validation results immediately after submission.
Add client-side answer validation for drag-drop results. Render FeedbackDisplay with instant feedback on completion.
Add client-side answer validation for text inputs. Render FeedbackDisplay with immediate results.
Integrate SegmentSummary component to display after each segment completion. Track accuracy across exercises within the segment.

requirements.summary: Create gamification system with XP, levels, badges, and streaks displayed on profile dashboard
acceptanceCriteria: Users earn XP for completing lessons and maintaining streaks
XP accumulation advances user through skill levels (e.g., Beginner, Intermediate, Advanced, Expert)
At least 5 achievement badges are available (e.g., First Lesson, Week Streak, Perfect Score, Speed Learner, Category Master)
Profile dashboard displays current level, total XP, badges earned, and current streak
Visual animations celebrate level-ups and badge unlocks

file_operations.description: Create utility functions to calculate user level from XP, determine badge eligibility (First Lesson, Week Streak, Perfect Score, Speed Learner, Category Master), and format XP/streak displays.

Create badge component displaying badge icon using frontend/public/assets/generated/badge-first-lesson.dim_256x256.png, frontend/public/assets/generated/badge-week-streak.dim_256x256.png, and frontend/public/assets/generated/badge-perfect-score.dim_256x256.png. Show earned vs locked states with visual distinction.
Create XP display component showing current XP, progress bar to next level, and level badge. Include animated transitions for XP gains.
Create streak display component showing current streak count with flame icon. Add pulsing animation for active streaks.
Create celebratory modal for level-up events with confetti animation, new level announcement, and encouragement message.
Create celebratory modal for badge unlock events showing the badge image and achievement description with animation effects.
After lesson completion, check for level-up or badge unlock conditions using gamification utilities. Trigger LevelUpModal or BadgeUnlockModal as appropriate.

requirements.summary: Implement certification system with downloadable certificates and verification capability
acceptanceCriteria: Users can view available certification tracks and their requirements
Upon completing all lessons in a track, a digital certificate is automatically generated
Certificate displays user name, skill name, completion date, and unique verification ID
Certificate can be downloaded as a PDF or shared via a unique URL
Certificate authenticity can be verified using the verification ID
Certificate data is stored on the Internet Computer blockchain

file_operations.description: Create hooks for generateCertificate() mutation and verifyCertificate() query using backend interface. Verify the authorization component's usage instructions before implementing.

Create certificate display component showing user name, skill name, completion date, and verification ID overlaid on frontend/public/assets/generated/certificate-bg.dim_1200x900.png. Include download as PDF and share URL functionality.
Create certification tracks overview component showing available skill tracks, required lessons per track, and user completion status. Highlight completed tracks with certificate generation option.
Create verification page component with input field for verification ID. Use verifyCertificate() to look up and display certificate details or show not found message.

Add routes for /certifications (CertificationTracks), /certificate/:id (CertificateView), and /verify (CertificateVerification). Ensure certification routes are protected for authenticated users, but verify route is public.

requirements.summary: Design user profile page with learning statistics, badges, certifications, and progress charts
acceptanceCriteria: Profile displays user avatar, name, and account creation date
Statistics section shows total lessons completed, current streak, and total XP
Skill breakdown shows levels achieved in each category
Badge collection is displayed with earned and locked badges
Certifications section lists all earned certificates with view/download options
Progress chart visualizes learning activity over the past 30 days

file_operations.description: Create custom hook wrapping getUserProgress() backend query using React Query. Return UserProgressView data including XP, streak, badges, and completed lessons. Verify the authorization component's usage instructions before implementing.
Create statistics panel component displaying total lessons completed, current streak with StreakDisplay, and total XP with XPDisplay. Use data from useUserProgress hook.
Create skill breakdown component showing level progress per category (Design, Programming, Business, Creative Arts) using data from getUserProgress and gamification utilities.
Create badge collection grid using BadgeDisplay components. Show all possible badges with earned badges highlighted. Use badges array from UserProgressView.
Create certifications list component displaying earned certificates with view and download links. Fetch certificates using backend interface.
Create chart component visualizing learning activity over past 30 days. Use a simple bar or line chart showing lessons completed per day.
Create profile page layout component integrating ProfileStatistics, SkillBreakdown, BadgeCollection, ProfileCertifications, and ActivityChart. Display user avatar and name from UserProfile.
Add route for /profile path using ProfilePage component. Ensure route is protected and accessible only to authenticated users.

requirements.summary: Establish energetic visual design with vibrant gradients, playful illustrations, smooth animations, and celebratory micro-interactions
acceptanceCriteria: Color palette uses vibrant, motivating colors (not defaulting to blue and purple)
Consistent use of gradients and dynamic visual elements throughout the interface
Playful illustrations enhance the learning experience without being distracting
Typography is clear, accessible, and optimized for reading educational content
Smooth transitions and animations enhance user engagement
Achievement celebrations include delightful micro-interactions and animations

file_operations.description: Define custom CSS variables for vibrant color palette including energetic primary colors (orange, yellow, pink, teal), gradient definitions, and animation keyframes for celebrations. Ensure high contrast for accessibility. Set educational-optimized typography with clear font choices and readable line heights.
Extend Tailwind theme with custom gradient colors, animation utilities (pulse, bounce, confetti), and responsive spacing. Configure font families optimized for educational content readability.

Create main layout component with navigation header, hero section using frontend/public/assets/generated/hero-learning.dim_1200x600.png for branding on the lesson catalog or landing area, and consistent spacing. Apply gradient backgrounds and smooth transitions throughout.
Wrap main application routes with Layout component to ensure consistent visual design across all pages.
Create animated background component with subtle floating shapes or gradient shifts to add dynamic energy without distracting from content.
Create confetti animation component for achievement celebrations. Trigger on level-ups and badge unlocks using canvas or CSS animations.
